title: Renewable Transport Fuel Obligation (RTFO) statistics 2024: Final report

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: The ‘still in existence’ values for 2023 and 2024 were not accounting for the use of certificates carried over from the previous obligation year.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: certificates still in existence = issued - revoked - redeemed certificates still in existence = issued + carried over from previous year - revoked - redeemed

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: Also, the 2022 ‘still in existence’ value was corrected as those certificates have since been used. This results in the ‘redeemed’ values for 2022 also being adjusted to the correct value. These values have been corrected in the following statistical tables:

sourceReferences.citationText: dft-press-office – Official Statistics: Renewable Transport Fuel Obligation (RTFO) statistics 2024: Final report
